exclusion_rule: Do not infer universal component K unless reverse-flow gate component isolation and same-QOI UQ all pass
reason: Negative or unstable K is a diagnostic artifact when the measured span contains unresolved recovery recirculation or reference subtraction error

exclusion_rule: Do not tune F6 from current high-recirculation or failed corner two-tap rows
reason: The rows do not isolate low-recirculation/nonrecirculating pressure loss and would hide recirculation residuals in a friction multiplier
allowed_use_after_exclusion: Use low-recirculation anchors or hybrid pressure architecture

exclusion_rule: Do not apply f_D=64/Re or apparent developing friction without convention reset distance and pressure basis
reason: Wrong Darcy/Fanning convention or missing development reset gives a false friction residual
allowed_use_after_exclusion: Reference-only method until row-specific basis is complete

exclusion_rule: Do not fit internal Nu from wall/test-section thermal residuals while external heat-loss source/sink labels are unresolved
reason: External losses can explain thermal shape residuals and must not be absorbed into internal convection
allowed_use_after_exclusion: Use setup-only heat-loss ledger and source/property gate first

exclusion_rule: Do not transfer HITEC-specific or nonmatching mixed-convection constants to the TAMU salt loop
reason: Fluid properties geometry boundary condition and nondimensional envelope may not overlap
allowed_use_after_exclusion: Use as regime screen only until source-envelope overlap passes

exclusion_rule: Do not admit a universal exchange coefficient from sparse onset evidence
reason: Three-point or diagnostic recirculation evidence cannot support a fitted exchange law
allowed_use_after_exclusion: Use architecture and require near-onset/nonrecirculating anchors

exclusion_rule: Do not switch to branch-sign network unless a discrete branch has net sign change
reason: Local reverse flow within a cross-section is not the same as a branch-level topology reversal
allowed_use_after_exclusion: Keep exchange-cell model for local recirculation

exclusion_rule: Do not use transient or ROM closures for current steady train attribution
reason: They require temporal or snapshot sufficiency not present in the current admissible evidence
